name: isvy
description: IntelliSurvey AI survey authoring tools for Claude Code

server_name.title: IntelliSurvey server
server_name.description: Hostname of your IntelliSurvey server, e.g. acme.intellisurvey.com (https:// and /mcp are added automatically)

default_theme.title: Default survey theme
default_theme.description: Theme id used for new surveys (optional). Leave unset to be asked on your first build; the choice can be saved here.
